Prompt.25: Write a story where: Whenever someone is buried in your town, plants grow and surround the grave, representing what sort of life they lived. When a pillar of the community dies, their grave is covered in thick, gnarled brambles.
Prompt.26: Write a story where: You thought you were ordinary, until a psychic tried to read your mind and instantly started screaming in horror and bleeding from the nose.
Prompt.27: Write a story where: Death has hourglasses for every person. One day, during a cleaning, he found a dust covered one that had rolled under his desk.
Prompt.28: Write a story where: You're immortal, but you can die. Upon your death, however you will be 'reset' to age 5 with a perfect memory of each life you've lived before.
Prompt.29: Write a story where: The villain was sentenced 350 years in prison for the atrocious crimes he committed; 349 years later he has not aged a bit, the guards and people start to get nervous...
Prompt.30: “One of us tells only the truth. “the other nothing but lies.” You kill the first guard and ask “Is he dead?”
Prompt.31: You muster up the courage to ask your dwarven friend why you don't see any female dwarves around. He laughs.
Prompt.32: The spell of the fae forced you to tell them your name. The fae looks at you with pure horror, while you look at them confused, because that was definitely not your name.
Prompt.33: "So, there's living, dead, and undead. Doesn't that imply that there are 'unliving' things as well?" Your master looks at you, with horror in their eyes.
Prompt.34: "Welcome to Hell. To leave, all you must do is finish seven impossible tasks decided by your seven greatest sins. Four people have made it out so far. Will you be the fifth?"
Prompt.35: The group of new humans who just joined your ship begin to act weird about the humans already present...they keep mentioning something call the uncanny valley? Maybe this is a place on Sol?
Prompt.36: You are death. The last living thing has died. You've put the chairs on the tables, turned out the lights, and locked the universe behind you. Something whispers from behind the door.
Prompt.37: Once an hour, every hour, the richest person on earth dies. This continues indefinitely...
Prompt.38: Turns out that Hell has no fire, torture, or frozen wastelands to endure. The only actual punishment is having to spend an eternity with the other assorted jerks that ended up there as well.
Prompt.39: Your little sister wakes you up and says that she thinks there's a monster in the house. The tall creature with glowing eyes, horns, and claws right by her looks just as terrified, and agrees.
Prompt.40: You, a side character, watch in horror as the MC forgives and doesn't kill the main villain, who murdered your friends and family, saying, "If I killed them, then I'd be just like them."
Prompt.41: You know a shapeshifter replaced your significant other a while ago. You don't much care, though; the relationship's been far healthier since.
Prompt.42: The wizard in your party only knows one spell. It's effective, but even the assassin feels bad about it.
Prompt.43: "This is the lockpicking lawyer and I have been sent to hell to repent for my crimes against god. So today, I am picking the lock to heaven's gate."
Prompt.44: Death Row Inmates can have their sentence abolished if they can handle a single night in the same cell as you; the most innocent looking person they've ever seen.
Prompt.45: There are many universes where an angel rebels against god, with Satan being a notable example. In this one, however, the rebel won.
Prompt.46: Every dragon rider gets a dragon egg to hatch upon their initiation to the guild. When your egg hatched, Your dragon came out a bit... Different.
Prompt.47: magical girls are real, and you have been chosen by a magical creature to become one. The only problem is your a full grown man with 2 kids and a wife.
Prompt.48: You got trapped inside your favorite video game. This isn’t really a problem, since you’re so familiar with it. It is, however, a problem for your parents, who got trapped with you.
Prompt.49: Gandalf and Dumbledore switch places. Gandalf is now running Hogwarts, while Dumbledore is leading The Fellowship.
